## Summary

-

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Packaging

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Checks

- [ ] `npm audit`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Windows package verified, if packaging changed
- [ ] Documentation updated, if behavior or setup changed

## Notes

Remove credentials, private URLs, local environment values, and generated artifacts before submitting.
